response.justification: Wei Chen is a Staff/Senior Software Engineer with over 15 years of progressively advanced experience, including AI-agent infrastructure, high-throughput distributed systems, and low-latency C/D-language services — a profile that vastly exceeds the scope of a junior/mid-level individual contributor role. While the TypeScript, fullstack, and even AWS/Kubernetes skills align well with the nice-to-haves, the overqualification mismatch is severe enough that hiring would likely result in rapid disengagement, misaligned salary expectations, or early attrition. There is also no explicit PostgreSQL experience and no mention of Nest.js.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and full-stack proficiency across multiple production environments (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, re:cinq)
Covers nearly all nice-to-have qualifications: LLM/AI tooling, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes experience
Demonstrated commitment to clean architecture, TDD, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: Severely overqualified — 15+ years as a Staff/Senior engineer applying for an entry-level role is a fundamental fit mismatch
No explicit PostgreSQL experience; database background centers on MongoDB, MySQL, and custom solutions
Nest.js not mentioned anywhere; React exposure appears limited to a single role (Optilyz)
